headline: Jim Cramer on Regeneron (REGN): “I Think The Stock’s Breaking Out Here”
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) is among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed alongside the tech market divide. Toward the end of the lightning round, a caller sought Cramer’s thoughts on the company, and here’s what he had to say in response: I think Regeneron, I think Leonard Schleifer’s doing an unbelievable job.
